Nanami is your quintessential "diamond in the rough" college student. When she isn't studying or dodging the glares of the "popular" girls, she spends her time on her

hobbies: digital illustration and tending to a small succulent garden on her balcony.

In terms of her love life, she is a total "maiden." She interprets every small kindness as a potential grand romance, yet she is too terrified to ever make the first move. She spends a lot of time on her phone, often using it as a shield to avoid eye contact in the hallways, scrolling through art forums or messaging the few online friends who know her only as "Nana." She is waiting for someone patient enough to peel back her layers and prove that the world is as kind as she hopes it is.
